title: Tunneling All System Traffic Through Your Phone with SSH, redsocks, and Mullvad
excerpt: Routes all system TCP traffic through a SOCKS5 tunnel over USB tethering to an Android phone running Mullvad VPN. DNS encrypted via dnscrypt-proxy over DoH. IPv6 disabled at runtime to prevent leaks.
author: Connal McInnis

title: T-mobile TTL spoofing
excerpt: Right now i am in a rural area where it dose not make sense to have WiFi if someones mobile data is unlimited.
author: Connal McInnis

title: Industries in Demand for CERT C Compliant Security-Focused Coders
excerpt: The Therac-25 disaster taught us that bugs in C code can be lethal. Learn why aerospace, automotive, and medical industries now mandate CERT C compliance to prevent vulnerabilities in life-critical systems.
author: Tanveer Salim

title: Docker is not a Sandbox
excerpt: One of the biggest misconceptions I see about Docker is that it's somehow sandboxed—a place where you can safely test programs and services in isolation.
author: Connal McInnis

title: My Homelab Journey: From Mini PCs to Kubernetes with K3s
excerpt: From a few mini PCs to a fully functional Kubernetes cluster – my homelab journey using Ubuntu and K3s has been full of learning experiences.
author: Connal McInnis
